eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 9:26 PM on OCT 10, 2019 Effective until 1:26 AM OCT 11, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for  Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police are looking for George W. Watanabe, a white male, 78 years of age, approximately 5 foot 6 inches, 140 pounds, with brown eyes and gray hair. The subject was last wearing a brown dress hat with a small gold in color cross on the top, Navy Blue in color shirt, and jeans. He was last seen in the area of the 2500 block of south Roanoke Street in Gilbert. He was driving a red in color, 2018 RAM Pickup truck, displaying a Washington State License Plate of, D P 6 4 0 2 1. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 9 1 1.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
